steps.t: Evidence of trespassers can likely be found at the water's edge in the northern part of the road in Thinglad, near where the sentinel Noriel is guardi…
Noriel, sentinel of Thinglad, stands on the road near the edge of Lothlórien. You should tell Noriel of the nets you found.
Noriel has asked you to search the woods nearby for signs of trespassers. You should search the forest floor for anything out of the ordinary.
Noriel guards the forest edge along the border of Lothlórien. You should bring the horseshoe to Noriel.
